hero.headline: Your property sale, under your control.
hero.subline: Free owner dashboard. Market data. Comparable sales. Then send your brief to competing agents — and choose the best deal.

heroHunter.subline: Tell us what you're looking for. We match you with local agents who send you relevant properties — filtered, ranked, and in one dashboard.

howItWorksHunter.title: How it works
howItWorksHunter.subtitle: Three steps. Zero spam. Only what you want.
howItWorksHunter.step1Body: Tell us your areas, budget, property type, and must-haves. Takes two minutes — and it's free forever.
howItWorksHunter.step2Body: Local agents in your area receive your brief. They respond with properties that actually fit your criteria — not bulk mailouts.
howItWorksHunter.step3Body: Agent emails, listings, viewing requests — all filtered and organised in your dashboard. No more inbox chaos.

stats.stat1Label: Average agent commission on a Redbridge property
stats.stat2Label: of owners want weekly updates but don't get them
stats.stat3Label: Cost of your Yalla owner dashboard — always free
stats.stat4Label: to create your dashboard and see your market data

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. No commission. Full control.
howItWorks.step1Body: Enter your address and get a free owner dashboard with local market data, comparable sales, and a timeline for your sale.
howItWorks.step2Body: One click sends your Owner Brief to competing agents in your area. They respond with real proposals — commission, marketing plan, portal coverage.
howItWorks.step3Body: Pick the best agent. Once instructed, they connect to your dashboard so you see every viewing, offer, and update in real time.

paths.ownerBody: Get a free dashboard with market data and comparable sales. When you're ready, send your brief to agents and choose the best deal.
paths.hunterBody: Tell us what you're looking for. We'll match you with properties and keep you updated as new homes hit the market.
paths.agentBody: Receive Owner Briefs from motivated sellers in your area. Respond with your proposal and win the instruction — on merit, not marketing spend.

whyYalla.title: Why Yalla?
whyYalla.item1Title: You get a dashboard. Not a bill.
whyYalla.item1Body: Every other platform charges you to list. We give you a free dashboard first — market data, comparable sales, a timeline for your sale. The dashboard is yours whether you use an agent or not.
whyYalla.item2Body: Instead of calling one agent and hoping for the best, you send your brief to multiple agents simultaneously. They respond with real proposals. You compare. You choose.
whyYalla.item3Body: Track every viewing, every offer, every piece of feedback in one place. If you instruct an agent, they connect to your dashboard so you see what's happening in real time.
whyYalla.item4Title: We're not agents. We're your tools.
whyYalla.item4Body: Yalla is a technology platform, not an estate agency. We don't take commission. We don't list your property. We give you the information and connections to make the best decision.

whyYallaHunter.title: Why Yalla?
whyYallaHunter.item1Body: Agents blast the same listings to thousands. 90% of what you receive doesn't match what you want. Yalla filters everything through your criteria so only relevant properties reach your dashboard.
whyYallaHunter.item2Title: Agents work for you. Not the other way around.
whyYallaHunter.item2Body: Create your Home Passport once and let agents come to you with properties that fit. No more scrolling. No more chasing. You set the brief — they deliver.
whyYallaHunter.item3Body: Viewings, offers, agent messages, property details — all tracked in your dashboard. No scattered WhatsApp threads, no lost emails, no forgotten viewings.
whyYallaHunter.item4Body: We don't sell your details. Agents only see your first name until you choose to connect. You control who contacts you and when.

ctaBand.headline: Ready to take control of your sale?
ctaBand.body: Create your free dashboard in two minutes. No card required. No commission — ever.

auth.magicLinkSent: We sent you a link. No password needed.

roles.owner: Owner — I want to sell or rent
roles.hunter: Home Hunter — I'm looking to buy or rent

owner.title: My Properties
owner.paymentSuccess: Payment successful! Your listing is now being published.

services.heroTitle: Everything you need to sell smarter
services.heroSubtitle: A free dashboard to understand your property. Optional tools to market it. Competing agents to sell it. No commission — ever.
services.dashboardSubtitle: Sign up in 2 minutes. Get instant market intelligence. No card required.
services.dashboardFeature1: Comparable sales data and automated valuation for your postcode
services.dashboardFeature2: Track viewings, offers, and buyer feedback in one place
services.dashboardFeature3: Send your Owner Brief to competing agents with one click
services.dashboardFeature4: Your data stays yours — export or delete anytime
services.briefSubtitle: You describe what you need. Agents compete to win your instruction. You choose the best proposal.
services.briefStep1Body: Tell us about your property, your timeline, and what matters most — fee, marketing, local knowledge, or speed.
services.briefStep2Body: Verified local agents receive your brief and submit competing proposals with their fee, strategy, and track record.
services.briefStep3Body: Review proposals side by side in your dashboard. Pick the agent that fits — or keep going on your own.
services.addonsTitle: Professional tools, when you need them
services.addonsSubtitle: Use these whether you instruct an agent or sell privately. Pay only for what you need.
services.addon1Desc: Local photographers, edited HD images within 24 hours. Buyers engage 3× more with professional shots.
services.addon2Desc: Interactive 3D walkthrough. Buyers explore your home before booking a viewing.
services.addon3Desc: Publication-ready floor plans and Energy Performance Certificate — required for Rightmove listings.
services.addon4Desc: Featured placement on Rightmove and Zoopla. Up to 4× more views than standard listings.
services.addonsNote: Prices shown are starting prices and may vary by location. All prices are confirmed before payment.
services.compTrad2: Locked into one agent's marketing plan
services.compTrad3: Limited visibility into viewings and feedback
services.compTrad4: Agent controls the process and the data
services.compYalla1: Free dashboard — no commission, no listing fee
services.compYalla2: Multiple agents compete with real proposals
services.compYalla3: Every viewing, offer, and message tracked in your dashboard
services.compYalla4: You own the process and your data — always
services.ctaSubtitle: Create your free dashboard in 2 minutes. See your market data. Send your brief when you're ready.
services.ctaAgentLink: I'm an agent — join the network

about.heroSubtitle: Yalla.House gives owners the tools agents keep to themselves. Zero commission. Full control. Complete transparency.
about.missionBody: Commissions are a relic of a time when sellers had no tools and no data. We believe every homeowner deserves full control over their sale — with modern technology, complete transparency, and zero middleman fees.

footer.tagline: Your property sale. Your data. Your choice of agent.

intake.greeting: Hi! I'm Yalla, your property assistant. Let's get started — I'll ask you a few questions and build your brief as we go.
intake.greetingReturning: Welcome back! I remember some details from last time. Let's pick up where we left off.
intake.placeholder: Type your answer or use the voice button...
intake.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
intake.voiceNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser

hunterPassport.greeting: Hi! Let's build your Home Passport. I'll ask you a few quick questions about what you're looking for, and you'll see your passport come together on the right.
hunterPassport.intentQ: First things first — are you looking to buy or rent?
hunterPassport.areasQ: Which areas of London interest you? Pick as many as you like.
hunterPassport.propertyTypesQ: What types of property are you interested in?
hunterPassport.bedroomsQ: How many bedrooms do you need at minimum?
hunterPassport.mustHavesQ: Any must-haves? Select everything that matters to you.
hunterPassport.dealbreakersQ: Any dealbreakers? Things you absolutely don't want.
hunterPassport.timelineQ: When are you looking to move?

ownerBrief.greeting: Let's create your Owner Brief. I'll ask about your property and what you're looking for in an agent.
ownerBrief.addressQ: What's the full address of your property?
ownerBrief.typeQ: What type of property is it?
ownerBrief.conditionQ: How would you describe the property's condition?
ownerBrief.tierQ: What level of agent support do you want?
ownerBrief.tierAdvisory: Advisory — you handle viewings, they advise on pricing and offers
ownerBrief.tierAssisted: Assisted — they manage viewings, you handle the rest
ownerBrief.tierManaged: Managed — they handle everything end to end
ownerBrief.notesQ: Anything else you'd like agents to know?

agentProfile.greeting: Let's set up your agent profile. This helps owners and hunters find you.
agentProfile.licenseQ: What's your license or registration number?
agentProfile.typesQ: What property types do you specialise in?
agentProfile.focusQ: Do you focus on sales, lettings, or both?
agentProfile.areasQ: Which areas do you cover? Enter postcodes or area names.
agentProfile.experienceQ: How many years of experience do you have?
agentProfile.teamQ: How many people are in your team?
agentProfile.sellingPointsQ: What makes your agency stand out from the competition?
